reach_why: Mostly reiterates known worries about correlated evaluators, fluency, and ungrounded synthesis rather than opening new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Connects fallibilism, evaluator-generator bias, and semantically unstable premises into a sharp underdetermination critique.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing human and model-family judges on nonsense-premise syntheses versus grounded controls.
explanation: Fluent AI syntheses can appear insightful while merely recycling patterns or amplifying shared, ungrounded error.
